author: anselmwang
description: Execute commands with short key sequences. For example, 'tp' for 'Toggle Preview' and 'tb' for 'Toggle Sidebar'. Easier to remember.

manifest.author: Yu Wang
manifest.description: Execute obsidian commands with short key sequences. For example, 'tp' for 'Toggle Preview' and 'tb' for 'Toggle Sidebar'. Easier to remember.
manifest.name: Key Sequence Shortcut

name: Key Sequence Shortcut

releases.author: anselmwang
releases.description:
Some commands added by QuickAdd plugin has uninterpretable command id. Description helps to improve readability of the configuration file.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/7410579/158294641-df493fd0-7165-4b22-a637-a5147b18165e.png)
releases.name: Support optional description field in configuration

releases.author: anselmwang
releases.description: This is because some command id has space in it.
releases.name: breaking: use tab instead of space to split config line

releases.author: anselmwang
releases.description: "obsidian-mark-and-select:select-from-mark" has no effect on mobile. This is because it is executed before the KeySequenceModal closes.
releases.name: fix: command doesn't work on mobile
